details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. Learn more

item_specifications.special_feature: Easy to Clean, Non Skid Bottom, Removable Cover, Waterproof

about_item: ORTHOPEDIC SUPPORT & JOINT RELIEF - Dual-layer high-density foam (Memory & Egg Crate) provides superior suspension that ensures no bottoming out. It effectively alleviates pressure on joints and hips—ideal for senior dog care and post-surgery recovery.

SOFA BED DESIGN: This bolster-style dog sofa bed is crafted with four-sided supports to provide extra neck and head cradling for your furry companion, enhancing peaceful slumber. Its enveloping contours invite your dog to cuddle up and relish a serene nocturnal repose.

COMFORT & DURABLE MATERIALS - Combines a soothing plush Sherpa top with durable faux linen sides that withstand wear. A waterproof internal liner shields the core sleeping area from accidents and odors, ensuring effortless maintenance.

MULTI-SIZE FIT FOR ALL BREEDS - Designed as a haven for dogs of all sizes, from medium to extra-large. Available in multiple sizes to ensure a perfect fit, providing ample room for your pet to stretch out or curl up in total relaxation.

CARE GUIDELINES - Features a removable, machine-washable cover with a convenient zipper for easy cleaning (foam is not washable). Please allow 24-48 hours after unpacking for the memory foam to fully inflate to its original shape.

sustainability_features.summary: This product has sustainability features recognized by trusted certifications.

features.title: Safer chemicals
features.text: Made with chemicals safer for human health and the environment.

certified_by.name: OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100
certified_by.description: OEKO-TEX® STANDARD 100 certified products require every component of a textiles production including all thread, buttons, and trims to be tested against a list of more than 1,000 regulated and unregulated chemicals which may be harmful to human health. The assessment process is globally standardised, independently conducted, and updated at least once per year based on new scientific information or regulatory requirements.

summary.text: Customers find this dog bed to be of high quality, particularly suitable for senior dogs, with plenty of space for large canines. The bed is comfortable, with one customer noting it has two sides for different comfort styles, and they appreciate its softness and durability, with one mentioning it holds up well in the wash. Customers consider it good value for money and easy to wash, and their pets love using it.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers praise the dog bed's construction and high-quality foam.

examples.snippet: It's a great bed. I've bought two of them for my grand doggy. That's getting up there in years so he can have one inside and one outside on the deck.
Great dog bed. Well-made and the dogs love it. I ordered a second one. Can’t beat the price for the great quality!
The bed is great quality — soft, well-made, and looks nice in the room. Unfortunately, my dog still prefers the floor! Can’t blame the bed, though....
The foam is good quality and comfortable for my dog, although I feel the size is a bit misleading compared to the pictures shown in the advertisement

insights.title: Size
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the dog bed's size, noting that it's good for large dogs with plenty of room to spare. One customer mentions it works well for two big dogs, while another notes it's perfect for a 90lb black mouth cur.

examples.snippet: Fantastic bed. Great size, nice support and the material isvery soft, yet lasting.
This dog bed is amazing! It’s big and incredibly comfortable, so much so that my 12-year-old joked she could take a nap in it....
...He is a 45 lb Corgi mix and this bed is the perfect size for him and it gives him plenty of room to stretch out. It's very soft and cushiony too....
my dog loves it. she said it’s very comfy and spacious

insights.title: Comfort
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed very comfortable and cozy, with several mentioning their pets slept peacefully on it. One customer notes that the foam has two sides for different comfort styles.

examples.snippet: My dog loves her new bed and is so much comfortable now. She definitely looks relaxed, the bed is thick yet soft enough to lay there for hour....
This bed is the best we have ever bought for our dog. It is very comfortable for her & at 12 years old, it is nice for her to have the edges to rest...
The dog bed has a thick bottom that is comfy and during the winter protects our dog from the cooler floor. I gave it four stars because we do...
...It came air tight and fluffed up immediately. It is thick, cozy, soft, and everything I was looking for....

insights.title: Softness
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed soft and fluffy, with one customer noting it's less stiff in the mornings.

examples.snippet: The bed is great quality — soft, well-made, and looks nice in the room. Unfortunately, my dog still prefers the floor! Can’t blame the bed, though....
...It’s nice and durable. Very soft. The outer edges that are thicker they love to rest their heads on. We haven’t washed them yet but it seems simple....
Dogs approve of this bed. Super soft and plush but sturdy. Great size for medium/large dog with room for added blankets. Haven’t washed it yet.
Very thick and plush. My 75lb. dog loves this bed and fits comfortably.

insights.title: Durability
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed durable, with several noting it will last at least a year, and one mentioning it holds up well in the wash.

examples.snippet: ...It’s nice and durable. Very soft. The outer edges that are thicker they love to rest their heads on. We haven’t washed them yet but it seems simple....
...It’s soft and supportive, waterproof, comfortable and sturdy and the stuffing is super soft! She loves it and it also looks appealing in any room!...
...Update !!!! It fell apart after the first wash !!!! The insides of the one side came out!
Such a good buy. Very durable

insights.title: Value for money
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed to be a good value, describing it as the best deal on orthopaedic beds and offering amazing quality for the price.

examples.snippet: ...That said: I’d buy it again. Great price, my dog unfortunately has to share and I’ll probably replace the older cat size beds with these.
Great value and super comfort for dog. I’ve had about 6-8 different beds for my dog. Saw this one like a mini couch and decided to purchase....
...If you want a comfy bed for your pup for a good price and are willing to take the time to hand wash and air dry the cover, this is the one.
...It was supper easy to assemble, definitely worth the price it’s good quality. I would buy this again!

insights.title: Washability
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed easy to wash, noting that it stays clean longer and can be taken apart for cleaning.

examples.snippet: ...All three dogs love this bed. It’s durable and keeps its shape. Easy to clean. Had many beds before, this one always has a dog on it.
...yet durable she digs in it all the time and haven’t had any issues, easy to wash, simple to put together, value and appearance is very nice for what...
...nearly immediately on the inside of the bed where it’s removable and washable. The fluffy edges also quickly began to tear at the seams....
...I like that it has a washable cover, her other bed didn’t have that feature.

insights.title: Pet happiness
insights.summary: Customers report that their pets love this dog bed, particularly noting its suitability for older dogs and giant breeds.

examples.snippet: This dog bed is really nice! The dog loves it! It comes packaged in a small box but expands quickly. Dog pictured is 25 lbs.
Good size bed. Fluffy and the dogs love it. However, it came with a very strong chemical smell. I docked one star for the smell.
My dog loves this bed! The large fits my 64 lb dog. This was easy to wash and dry in my front loader washer and dryer!
My dogs love this bed! I got one of the bigger sizes and at least 3 can fit. Sometimes 4 if they aren't sprawled out....

authors_reviews.title: Thick and cozy!
authors_reviews.text: I purchased 42X30 for my pitbull and pocket bully. It’s definitely big enough for both of them but they probably won’t lay together. It’s definitely not flat or thin. It’s excellent quality and thickness. Great buy for the price!
authors_reviews.author: Jessica

authors_reviews.title: Great bed!!!
authors_reviews.text: This bed is the best! It’s soft and supportive, waterproof, comfortable and sturdy and the stuffing is super soft! She loves it and it also looks appealing in any room! The support is amazing. Best bed I’ve bought!
authors_reviews.author: Dana shields

authors_reviews.title: Great dog bed!
authors_reviews.text: My dog loves this bed! The large fits my 64 lb dog. This was easy to wash and dry in my front loader washer and dryer!
authors_reviews.author: Open Minded Consumer

authors_reviews.title: Great Bed
authors_reviews.text: Great size bed and easy to assemble. The padding comes separate, so I kept it away from my dog to allow it to fully expand for about an hour. This bed is soft but durable. Its zipper provides easy access to remove the liner and clean it in the washer. I have an 85lb Labrador retriever and his weight doesn’t seem to affect the thickness of the foam. My dog and cat both enjoy sleeping on this bed.
authors_reviews.author: amanda

authors_reviews.title: Large enough for two.
authors_reviews.text: This bed is so nice for older pups. If you have two dogs that love to sleep together this is the one to get. Other beds never seem lg enough. The foam mat inside helps with arthritic bones. So happy with my purchase and the price point is worth it!
authors_reviews.author: Kathleen Weeks

authors_reviews.title: Difficult to wash
authors_reviews.text: It's a well-made, comfortable bed, and my dog loves it. He has torn a way more expensive bed into shreds in one day, but has given up on trying to shred this one after two or three tries (not saying it's indestructible, but my dog loves to eviscerate things, and this bed has survived several months now). One of the reasons I bought it is that the cover can be removed and washed. The problem is that the cushions that form the border are part of the cover and have to be washed with it. That's fine for washing, but it means that it comes out of the machine as a soaking mess that takes forever to dry. If there is a way to remove those cushions before washing, I haven't found it, but that would make this bed perfect.
authors_reviews.author: Eve

authors_reviews.title: Nice bed
authors_reviews.text: Its great quality! My dog seem to be very comfortable! Easybto follow instructions. The zipper is very nice.The other dog decided he liked it too! Its a nice thick cushion and the sides are a perfect head pillow!1 dog is a mini aussie doodle. The one I bought it for is a border collie aussie mix. They both fit! I have a feeling i will need to get one for my other dog.I did put a sheet over bet to keep it clean. Too much mud outside
authors_reviews.author: Sarah

authors_reviews.title: Good product
authors_reviews.text: Big and comfortable. Very good material
authors_reviews.author: Sarah Wormley

other_countries_reviews.title: Good for dog crates! Water resistant and washable
other_countries_reviews.text: These dog beds are made well for dog crates. They are water resistant as my puppy submissive peed on it and it wasn't absorbed into the bed. Easy to wash, just follow the instructions. Very soft, just make sure you give enough or extra time for the foam insert to absorb air. I waited 3 days and it turned out perfect! My puppy can't chew through it either because it's high quality. Don't hesitate to buy!!(Ignore the stuff in the photos he was eating on the bed)
other_countries_reviews.author: ACWILLIXM

other_countries_reviews.title: Perfect pet bed
other_countries_reviews.text: My dog and my cat absolutely love this it’s the perfect size and looks amazing
other_countries_reviews.author: Jas
